title: Graham Hancock: “UFOs Protect the Ark of the Covenant!”
summary: Graham Hancock discusses his decades-long research into ancient civilizations, the Ark of the Covenant in Ethiopia, the astronomical alignments of the Pyramids of Giza and the Sphinx, and his theory that a lost civilization existed during the last ice age. He also addresses his conflicts and recent reconciliation with Egyptologist Zahi Hawass, and explores the worldwide tradition of flood myths and the Atlantis story.

events.description: Graham Hancock spent a year in Somalia funded by the Lum Foundation
Israel airlifted Ethiopian Jews out of Ethiopia during the overthrow of the Mengistu regime
Graham Hancock had a falling out with Zahi Hawass
Philip Hancock (Graham's grandfather) climbed the Great Pyramid on April 5th

key_claims.claim: The Ark of the Covenant is kept in Axum, Ethiopia, and the guardians who protect it develop cataracts and typically die within three years of appointment due to exposure to 'a thing of fire'
The Great Pyramid was not built as a tomb and the notion it was built in 23 years during Khufu's reign is absurd
The three Great Pyramids of Giza align with the three stars of Orion's Belt as they appeared 12,500 years ago
The Great Sphinx was originally a full lion figure representing the constellation Leo, later recarved to have a human head
Water erosion patterns on the Sphinx indicate it is approximately 12,500 years old rather than 4,500 years old
Pillar 43 at Göbekli Tepe contains an astronomical diagram marking a date of 12,500 to 12,800 years ago
The Atlantis date given by Plato (9,600 BC) corresponds to meltwater pulse 1B, a major sea level rise event at the end of the last ice age
There are approximately 200 flood myths from around the world sharing common features
Remote scanning shows huge unexplored cavities within the Great Pyramid, including what appears to be a second Grand Gallery
